name: Regina's Cheddar Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stainless-steel or glass bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
2. Cut the butter and margarine into large cubes. Using your hands, work the cubes into the flour mixture until the mixture resembles large peas.
3. Add the cheese and buttermilk to make a soft dough.
4. On a well-floured surface, roll out the dough to a thickness of 3/4 inch.
5. Cut the rolled-out dough into 2-inch biscuits using a biscuit cutter.
(The biscuits will keep for up to 24 hours in the refrigerator before baking.)
6. Bake at 350°F until golden brown. Makes about 30 biscuits.
Per Biscuit:
- 165 calories
- 3 g protein
- 8 g carbohydrate
- 14 g fat (5 g saturated)
- 15 mg cholesterol
- 348 mg sodium
- 0 g fiber
